Name: ASSUME_ATTACK
Summary: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has a given ATK.
Description: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has a given ATK.

Name: ASSUME_ATTRIBUTE
Summary: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has given attributes.
Description: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has given [attributes](/api/enums/MonsterAttribute).

Name: ASSUME_CODE
Summary: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has a given passcode.
Description: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has a given passcode.

Name: ASSUME_DEFENSE
Summary: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has a given DEF.
Description: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has a given DEF.

Name: ASSUME_LEVEL
Summary: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has a given Level.
Description: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has a given Level.

Name: ASSUME_LINK
Summary: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has a given Link Rating.
Description: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has a given Link Rating.

Name: ASSUME_LINKMARKER
Summary: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has given Link Markers.
Description: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has given [Link Markers](/api/enums/LinkMarker).

Name: ASSUME_RACE
Summary: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has given races.
Description: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has given [races](/api/enums/MonsterRace).

Name: ASSUME_RANK
Summary: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has a given Rank.
Description: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has a given Rank.

Name: ASSUME_TYPE
Summary: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has given card types.
Description: Temporarily assumes that the affected card has given [card types](/api/enums/CardType).

Name: OPCODE_ADD
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation adds its operands, which must be numbers.

Name: OPCODE_ALLOW_ALIASES
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation allows alias names to be declared.

Name: OPCODE_ALLOW_TOKENS
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation allows token names to be declared.

Name: OPCODE_AND
Summary: Performs logical AND on its operands.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation performs logical AND on its operands, which must be bools.

Name: OPCODE_BAND
Summary: Performs bitwise AND on its operands.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation performs bitwise AND on its operands, which must be integers.

Name: OPCODE_BNOT
Summary: Performs bitwise NOT on its operand.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation performs bitwise NOT on its operand, which must be an integer.

Name: OPCODE_BOR
Summary: Performs bitwise OR on its operands.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation performs bitwise OR on its operands, which must be integers.

Name: OPCODE_BXOR
Summary: Performs bitwise XOR on its operands.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation performs bitwise XOR on its operands, which must be integers.

Name: OPCODE_DIV
Summary: Divides its first operand by its second operand.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation divides its first operand by its second operand. Both operands must be numbers.

Name: OPCODE_GETATTRIBUTE
Summary: Evaluates to the attribute(s) of the card being checked.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation evaluates to the [attribute(s)](/api/enums/MonsterAttribute) of the card being checked.

Name: OPCODE_GETCODE
Summary: Evaluates to the passcode of the card being checked.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation evaluates to the passcode of the card being checked.

Name: OPCODE_GETRACE
Summary: Evaluates to the race(s) of the card being checked.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation evaluates to the [race(s)](/api/enums/MonsterRace) of the card being checked.

Name: OPCODE_GETSETCARD
Summary: Evaluates to the archetype(s) of the card being checked.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation evaluates to the [archetype(s)](/api/enums/Archetype) of the card being checked.

Name: OPCODE_GETTYPE
Summary: Evaluates to the card type(s) of the card being checked.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation evaluates to the [card type(s)](/api/enums/CardType) of the card being checked.

Name: OPCODE_ISATTRIBUTE
Summary: Checks for cards whose attribute(s) matches its operand.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation checks for cards whose attribute(s) matches its operand, which must be an [attribute](/api/enums/MonsterAttribute) value.

Name: OPCODE_ISCODE
Summary: Checks for cards whose passcode matches its operand.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation checks for cards whose passcode matches its operand, which must be a card passcode.

Name: OPCODE_ISRACE
Summary: Checks for cards whose race(s) matches its operand.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation checks for cards whose race(s) matches its operand, which must be a [race](/api/enums/MonsterRace) value.

Name: OPCODE_ISSETCARD
Summary: Checks for cards with an archetype that matches its operand.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation checks for cards with an archetype that matches its operand, which must be an [archetype](/api/enums/Archetype) value.

Name: OPCODE_ISTYPE
Summary: Checks for cards whose card type(s) matches its operand.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation checks for cards whose card type(s) matches its operand, which must be a [card type](/api/enums/CardType) value.

Name: OPCODE_LSHIFT
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation shifts its first operand's bits to the left by the number of positions specified by its second operand. Both operands must be numbers.

Name: OPCODE_MUL
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation multiplies its operands, which must be numbers.

Name: OPCODE_NEG
Summary: Flips the sign of its operand.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation flips the sign (`+` or `-`) of its operand, which must be a number.

Name: OPCODE_NOT
Summary: Performs logical NOT on its operand.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation performs logical NOT on its operand, which must be a bool.

Name: OPCODE_OR
Summary: Performs logical OR on its operands.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation performs logical OR on its operands, which must be bools.

Name: OPCODE_RSHIFT
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation shifts its first operand's bits to the right by the number of positions specified by its second operand. Both operands must be numbers.

Name: OPCODE_SUB
Summary: Subtracts its second operand from its first operand.
Description: In card declaration filters, this operation subtracts its second operand from its first operand. Both operands must be numbers.

Name: ANNOUNCE_CARD
Summary: Declaring the name of any card.
Description: Declaring the name of any card.

Name: ANNOUNCE_CARD_FILTER
Description: Declaring the name of a card matching a filter.

Name: CHINT_ATTRIBUTE
Description: Shows the following hint on a card's tooltip when hovered over: `Declared Attribute: `

Name: CHINT_CARD
Description: Shows the following hint on a card's tooltip when hovered over: `Declared card: `

Name: CHINT_NUMBER
Description: Shows the following hint on a card's tooltip when hovered over: `Declared number: `

Name: CHINT_RACE
Description: Shows the following hint on a card's tooltip when hovered over: `Declared Type: `

Name: CHINT_TURN
Description: Shows the following hint on a card's tooltip when hovered over: `Turns passed: `

Name: NO_FLIP_EFFECT
Summary: Prevents triggering FLIP effects when changing a card's position.
Description: A special constant to combine with other position constants to prevent triggering FLIP effects when changing a card's position.

Name: POS_ATTACK
Description: Attack Position

Name: POS_DEFENSE
Description: Defense Position

Name: POS_FACEDOWN
Description: Face-down Position

Name: POS_FACEDOWN_ATTACK
Description: Face-down Attack Position. Used with ["Darkness Approaches" (Pre-Errata)](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Card_Errata:Darkness_Approaches).

Name: POS_FACEDOWN_DEFENSE
Description: Face-down Defense Position

Name: POS_FACEUP
Description: Face-up Position

Name: POS_FACEUP_ATTACK
Description: Face-up Attack Position

Name: POS_FACEUP_DEFENSE
Description: Face-up Defense Position

Name: STATUS_ACTIVATE_DISABLED
Description: A card with this status had its activation negated.

Name: STATUS_ACT_FROM_HAND
Summary: Can be activated from the hand.
Description: A Trap card with this status can be activated from hand.

Name: STATUS_ATTACK_CANCELED
Description: A card with this status had its attack negated.

Name: STATUS_BATTLE_DESTROYED
Description: During battle, a card with this status has already been destroyed by battle.

Name: STATUS_BATTLE_RESULT
Summary: Already destroyed by battle (at the end of Damage Calculation).
Description: At the end of Damage Calculation, a card with this status has already been destroyed by battle.

Name: STATUS_CHAINING
Summary: Has one of its effects on the current chain.
Description: A card with this status has one of its effects on the current chain.

Name: STATUS_CONTINUOUS_POS
Summary: Will return to its current position when changed to other positions.
Description: A card with this status will return to its current position when changed to other positions.

Name: STATUS_COPYING_EFFECT
Summary: Currently copying the effect(s) of another card.
Description: A card with this status is currently copying the effect(s) of another card.

Name: STATUS_DESTROY_CONFIRMED
Description: A card with this status is going to be destroyed.

Name: STATUS_DISABLED
Description: A card with this status has its effects negated.

Name: STATUS_EFFECT_ENABLED
Description: A card with this status has its effects already enabled, meaning it has already been Summoned completely and its effects have been applied.

Name: STATUS_EFFECT_REPLACED
Description: A card with this status has its effects replaced.

Name: STATUS_FLIP_SUMMON_TURN
Summary: Was Flip Summoned in the current turn.
Description: A card with this status was Flip Summoned in the current turn.

Name: STATUS_FORBIDDEN
Description: A card with this status cannot be used, e.g. due to the effects of ["Prohibition"](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Prohibition) or ["Psi-Blocker"](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Psi-Blocker).

Name: STATUS_FORM_CHANGED
Summary: Had its position manually changed in the current turn.
Description: A monster with this status had its position manually changed in the current turn.

Name: STATUS_FUTURE_FUSION
Description: A Fusion Monster with this status is being summoned by ["Future Fusion"](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Future_Fusion). Its Fusion Materials will not trigger their effects when it's Summoned.

Name: STATUS_INITIALIZING
Description: A card with this status is currently initializing its effects, i.e. executing the `initial_effect` function of its script.

Name: STATUS_JUST_POS
Description: A monster with this status just had its position changed.

Name: STATUS_LEAVE_CONFIRMED
Summary: Would be sent to the GY after the chain resolves.
Description: After the chain resolves, an activated card with this status would immediately be sent to the GY.

Name: STATUS_NO_LEVEL
Description: A monster with this status is treated as having Level/Rank/Link 0.

Name: STATUS_OPPO_BATTLE
Description: A monster with this status is battling an opponent's monsters. The status is reset at the end of the Damage Step.

Name: STATUS_PROC_COMPLETE
Description: A monster with this status has been Summoned properly (usually by its own condition).

Name: STATUS_SET_TURN
Summary: Was Set in the current turn.
Description: A Spell/Trap with this status was Set in the current turn.

Name: STATUS_SPSUMMON_STEP
Description: A monster with this status is currently being Special Summoned. **The Special Summon is not yet complete.**

Name: STATUS_SPSUMMON_TURN
Summary: Was Special Summoned in the current turn.
Description: A monster with this status was Special Summoned in the current turn.

Name: STATUS_SUMMONING
Description: A monster with this status *would be* Summoned.

Name: STATUS_SUMMON_DISABLED
Description: A monster with this status had its Summon negated.

Name: STATUS_SUMMON_TURN
Summary: Was Normal Summoned/Set in the current turn.
Description: A monster with this status was Normal Summoned/Set in the current turn.

Name: STATUS_TO_DISABLE
Description: A card with this status *would be* negated.

Name: STATUS_TO_ENABLE
Summary: Would have its effect negation removed.
Description: A card with this status would have its effect negation removed.

Name: CHAININFO_CHAIN_ID
Summary: The unique ID of a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves a unique integer representing the ID of the requested Chain Link.

Name: CHAININFO_DISABLE_PLAYER
Summary: The player that negated the activation, effect, or Summon in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the player that negated the activation, effect, or Summon of the requested Chain Link.

Name: CHAININFO_DISABLE_REASON
Summary: The effect that negated the activation, effect, or Summon in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [effect](/api/types/Effect) that negated the activation, effect, or Summon of the requested Chain Link.

Name: CHAININFO_EXTTYPE
Summary: The card type(s) of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [card type(s)](/api/enums/CardType) of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation. This excludes [`TYPE_TRAP`](/api/constants/CardType/TYPE_TRAP) for Trap Monsters, unlike [`CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_TYPE`](/api/constants/ChainInfo/CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_TYPE).

Name: CHAININFO_TARGET_CARDS
Summary: The group of cards targeted by the effect in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [group](/api/types/Group) of cards targeted by the effect of the requested Chain Link.

Name: CHAININFO_TARGET_PARAM
Summary: The set parameter associated to a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the value set by [Duel.SetTargetParam](/api/functions/Duel/SetTargetParam) for the requested Chain Link.

Name: CHAININFO_TARGET_PLAYER
Summary: The player targeted by the effect in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the player "targeted" by the effect of the requested Chain Link. The target player is usually defined in [Duel.SetTargetPlayer](/api/functions/Duel/SetTargetPlayer) and in effects with the [`EFFECT_FLAG_PLAYER_TARGET`](/api/constants/EffectFlag/EFFECT_FLAG_PLAYER_TARGET) flag.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_ATTACK
Summary: The ATK of the monster whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the ATK of the monster whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_ATTRIBUTE
Summary: The attribute(s) of the monster whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [attribute(s)](/api/enums/MonsterAttribute) of the monster whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_CODE
Summary: The passcode of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the passcode of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_CODE2
Summary: The second passcode of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the second passcode, if any, of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_CONTROLER
Summary: The player in possession of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the player in possession of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_DEFENSE
Summary: The DEF of the monster whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the DEF of the monster whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_EFFECT
Summary: The effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [effect](/api/types/Effect) activated in the requested Chain Link.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_LEVEL
Summary: The Level of the monster whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), returns the Level of the monster whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_LOCATION
Summary: The location of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [location](/api/enums/Location) of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation. This excludes [symbolic locations](/api/tags/symbolic-location). To include them, use [`CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_LOCATION_SYMBOLIC`](/api/constants/ChainInfo/CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_LOCATION_SYMBOLIC) instead.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_LOCATION_SYMBOLIC
Summary: The (symbolic) location of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [location](/api/enums/Location) of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation. The retrieved value may be a [symbolic location](/api/tags/symbolic-location). To exclude them, use [`CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_LOCATION`](/api/constants/ChainInfo/CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_LOCATION) instead.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_PLAYER
Summary: The player that activated the effect in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the player that activated the effect in the requested Chain Link.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_POSITION
Summary: The position of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [position](/api/enums/CardPosition) of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_RACE
Summary: The race(s) of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [race(s)](/api/enums/MonsterRace) of the monster whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_RANK
Summary: The Rank of the monster activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the Rank of the monster whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_SEQUENCE
Summary: The sequence of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the sequence of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation. The returned sequence is not limited to a [symbolic location](/api/tags/symbolic-location) even if the card was in one. To account for symbolic locations, use  [`CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_SEQUENCE_SYMBOLIC`](/api/constants/ChainInfo/CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_SEQUENCE_SYMBOLIC) instead.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_SEQUENCE_SYMBOLIC
Summary: The (symbolic) sequence of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the sequence of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation. If the card was in a [symbolic location](/api/tags/symbolic-location), the returned value is its sequence when limited to that symbolic location. To **not** account for symbolic locations, use [`CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_SEQUENCE`](/api/constants/ChainInfo/CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_SEQUENCE) instead.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_SETCODES
Summary: The archetypes of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves a table containing the [archetypes](/api/enums/Archetype) of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as they were at the time of activation.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_STATUS
Summary: The status(es) of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [status(es)](/api/enums/CardStatus) of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_SUMMON_LOCATION
Summary: The summon location of the monster whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [location](/api/enums/Location) where the monster whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link was summoned from.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_SUMMON_PROC_COMPLETE
Summary: If the monster whose effect activated in a Chain Link was properly summoned.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves a [bool](/api/types/bool) representing whether the monster whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link was properly summoned or not.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_SUMMON_TYPE
Summary: The summon type of the monster whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [type of the Summon](/api/enums/SummonType) of the monster whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link.

Name: CHAININFO_TRIGGERING_TYPE
Summary: The card type(s) of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the [card type(s)](/api/enums/CardType) of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link, as it was at the time of activation. This includes [`TYPE_TRAP`](/api/constants/CardType/TYPE_TRAP) for Trap Monsters, unlike [`CHAININFO_EXTTYPE`](/api/constants/ChainInfo/CHAININFO_EXTTYPE).

Name: CHAININFO_TYPE
Summary: The main card type of the card whose effect activated in a Chain Link.
Description: When used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo), retrieves the main [card type](/api/enums/CardType) (Monster, Spell, or Trap) of the card whose effect was activated in the requested Chain Link. Trap monsters will return [`TYPE_MONSTER`](/api/constants/CardType/TYPE_MONSTER).

Name: DECLTYPE_MONSTER
Description: Displays "Monster" as an option for the player to select. Used for effects that make the player declare a card type (Monster, [Spell](/api/constants/CommonOption/DECLTYPE_SPELL), or [Trap](/api/constants/CommonOption/DECLTYPE_TRAP)).

Name: DECLTYPE_SPELL
Description: Displays "Spell" as an option for the player to select. Used for effects that make the player declare a card type ([Monster](/api/constants/CommonOption/DECLTYPE_MONSTER), Spell, or [Trap](/api/constants/CommonOption/DECLTYPE_TRAP)).

Name: DECLTYPE_TRAP
Description: Displays "Trap" as an option for the player to select. Used for effects that make the player declare a card type ([Monster](/api/constants/CommonOption/DECLTYPE_MONSTER), [Spell](/api/constants/CommonOption/DECLTYPE_SPELL), or Trap).

Name: SELECT_HEADS
Description: Displays "Heads" as an option for the player to select. Used for effects that make the player declare a coin result (Heads or [Tails](/api/constants/CommonOption/SELECT_TAILS)).

Name: SELECT_TAILS
Description: Displays "Tails" as an option for the player to select. Used for effects that make the player declare a coin result ([Heads](/api/constants/CommonOption/SELECT_TAILS) or Tails).

Name: COUNTER_NEED_ENABLE
Summary: Counter is removed when the card it's placed on is negated.
Description: Added to counter codes to require the card they're placed on to not have its effects negated.

Name: COUNTER_WITHOUT_PERMIT
Summary: Counter can be placed on any card.
Description: Added to counter codes to allow placing the counter on any card. Without this, counters need to be permitted using [`Card.EnableCounterPermit`](/api/functions/Card/EnableCounterPermit).

Name: EFFECT_COUNT_CODE_CHAIN
Summary: Count limit applies to activations per chain.
Description: When set as a flag using [`Effect.SetCountLimit`](/api/functions/Effect/SetCountLimit), the limit applies to activations per chain (per copy of the card) rather than uses per turn.

Name: EFFECT_COUNT_CODE_DUEL
Summary: Count limit applies to uses per Duel.
Description: When set as a flag using [`Effect.SetCountLimit`](/api/functions/Effect/SetCountLimit), the limit applies to uses per Duel rather than uses per turn.

Name: EFFECT_COUNT_CODE_OATH
Summary: Count limit applies to activations instead of uses.
Description: When set as a flag using [`Effect.SetCountLimit`](/api/functions/Effect/SetCountLimit), the limit applies to activations rather than uses. Negated activations do not count towards the limit.

Name: EFFECT_COUNT_CODE_SINGLE
Summary: Count limit is shared between multiple effects per copy of a card.
Description: When set as a flag using [`Effect.SetCountLimit`](/api/functions/Effect/SetCountLimit) on multiple effects, the limit is shared between those effects (per copy of a card). Used for texts such as `Once per turn: You can activate 1 of these effects.` (e.g., ["Shutendoji"](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Shutendoji)).

Name: DOUBLE_DAMAGE
Description: When set as the [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue) of an [effect that changes battle damage](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_BATTLE_DAMAGE) or a [piercing effect](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_PIERCE), the damage inflicted is doubled.

Name: HALF_DAMAGE
Description: When set as the [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue) of an [effect that changes battle damage](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_BATTLE_DAMAGE) or a [piercing effect](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_PIERCE), the damage inflicted is halved.

Name: SEQ_DECKBOTTOM
Summary: Sending to the bottom of the Deck.
Description: When used as the sequence for [`Duel.SendtoDeck`](/api/functions/Duel/SendtoDeck), the cards are sent to the bottom of the Deck.

Name: SEQ_DECKSHUFFLE
Description: When used as the sequence for [`Duel.SendtoDeck`](/api/functions/Duel/SendtoDeck), the cards are shuffled into the Deck.

Name: SEQ_DECKTOP
Summary: Sending to the top of the Deck.
Description: When used as the sequence for [`Duel.SendtoDeck`](/api/functions/Duel/SendtoDeck), the cards are sent to the top of the Deck.

Name: DUEL_0_ATK_DESTROYED
Summary: 0-ATK monsters are destroyed when battling each other.
Description: In Duels with this option, 0-ATK monsters are destroyed when battling each other.

Name: DUEL_1ST_TURN_DRAW
Summary: The starting player draws a card on their first turn.
Description: In Duels with this option, the starting player draws a card on their first turn.

Name: DUEL_1_FIELD
Summary: Only 1 field can be face-up in the Field Zone at once.
Description: In Duels with this option, only 1 Field Spell can be face-up in the Field Zone at once. To activate another Field Spell or place another one face-up, the existing face-up Field Spell is first sent to the GY.

Name: DUEL_3_COLUMNS_FIELD
Summary: There are only 3 Main Monster Zones and 3 Spell & Trap Zones.
Description: In Duels with this option, there are only 3 Main Monster Zones and 3 Spell & Trap Zones.

Name: DUEL_ATTACK_FIRST_TURN
Summary: The starting player can attack on their first turn.
Description: In Duels with this option, the starting player can attack on their first turn.

Name: DUEL_CANNOT_SUMMON_OATH_OLD
Summary: Negated Summons do not count for restrictions that care about performed Summons.
Description: In Duels with this option, negated Summons do not count for Summon restrictions that care about performed Summons. For example, if the Normal Summon of a player's monster was negated, the player would still be able to activate ["Rage with Eyes of Blue"](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Rage_with_Eyes_of_Blue).

Name: DUEL_CAN_REPOS_IF_NON_SUMPLAYER
Summary: Players can change the battle position of monsters they did not Summon.
Description: In Duels with this option, players can change the battle position of monsters they did not Summon after taking control of it from the opponent, even if they were Summoned that turn.

Name: DUEL_DRAW_UNTIL_5
Summary: Players draw cards until they have 5 cards in their hand in the Draw Phase.
Description: In Duels with this option, players draw cards until they have 5 cards in their hand in the Draw Phase, or draw 1 card if they already have at least 5 cards.

Name: DUEL_EMZONE
Description: Duels with this option include the [Extra Monster Zones](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Extra_Monster_Zone).

Name: DUEL_EQUIP_NOT_SENT_IF_MISSING_TARGET
Summary: Equip Cards are not sent to the GY if their target leaves the field.
Description: In Duels with this option, Equip Cards are not sent to the GY even if their target is no longer on the field.

Name: DUEL_FSX_MMZONE
Summary: Fusion, Synchro, and Xyz Monsters can be Special Summoned to Main Monster Zones.
Description: In Duels with this option, Fusion, Synchro, and Xyz Monsters can be Special Summoned from the Extra Deck to the Main Monster Zone even if they are not Linked.

Name: DUEL_INVERTED_QUICK_PRIORITY
Summary: Traps can't chain to each other or miss timing, but can activate in Damage Step.
Description: In Duels with this option, Traps cannot be chained to each other, cannot [miss timing](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/If..._You_Can_VS_When..._You_Can), and can be activated in the Damage Step.

Name: DUEL_MODE_GOAT
Description: A composite Duel option that enforces [Goat Format rules](https://www.goatformat.com/rules.html).

Name: DUEL_MODE_MR1
Description: A composite Duel option that enforces the [first iteration of the Master Rule](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Master_Rule#Master_Rule), colloquially called "Master Rule 1".

Name: DUEL_MODE_MR2
Description: A composite Duel option that enforces [Master Rule 2](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Master_Rule#Master_Rule_2).

Name: DUEL_MODE_MR3
Description: A composite Duel option that enforces [Master Rule 3](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Master_Rule#Master_Rule_3).

Name: DUEL_MODE_MR4
Description: A composite Duel option that enforces the [New Master Rule](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Master_Rule#Master_Rule_4), colloquially called "Master Rule 4".

Name: DUEL_MODE_MR5
Description: A composite Duel option that enforces the [April 1, 2020 revision of the Master Rule](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Master_Rule#Master_Rule_(April_1,_2020_revision)), colloquially called "Master Rule 5".

Name: DUEL_MODE_RUSH
Description: A composite Duel option that enforces [Rush Duel](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Yu-Gi-Oh!_Rush_Duel) rules.

Name: DUEL_MODE_SPEED
Description: A composite Duel option that enforces [Speed Duel](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Speed_Duel) rules.

Name: DUEL_NORMAL_SUMMON_FACEUP_DEF
Summary: Monsters can be Normal Summoned in face-up Defense Position.
Description: In Duels with this option, monsters can be Normal Summoned in face-up Defense Position.

Name: DUEL_NO_HAND_LIMIT
Summary: Players have no hand size limit.
Description: In Duels with this option, players have no hand size limit which would otherwise make them send cards to the GY if exceeded in the End Phase.

Name: DUEL_NO_MAIN_PHASE_2
Description: Duels with this option have no [Main Phase 2](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Main_Phase_2).

Name: DUEL_NO_STANDBY_PHASE
Description: Duels with this option have no [Standby Phase](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Standby_Phase).

Name: DUEL_OCG_OBSOLETE_IGNITION
Summary: The turn player can activate an Ignition Effect after a Chain or Summon.
Description: In Duels with this option, when a Summon is completed or a Chain has finished resolving, the turn player can activate a monster's Ignition Effect (not just fast effects) before the opponent is allowed to respond.

Name: DUEL_PSEUDO_SHUFFLE
Description: In Duels with this option, the Deck is **never** shuffled, whether at the start of the Duel, through rules, or card effects. The EDOPro client may still play the shuffling animation but the cards stay in the same order.

Name: DUEL_PZONE
Summary: Includes Pendulum Zones integrated in the Spell & Trap Zones.
Description: Duels with this option have [Pendulum Zones](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Pendulum_Zone) integrated in the Spell & Trap Zones. For separate Pendulum Zones, see [`DUEL_SEPARATE_PZONE`](/api/constants/DuelOption/DUEL_SEPARATE_PZONE).

Name: DUEL_RELAY
Summary: Players in the same team switch to the next when one loses.
Description: In Duels with this option, players in the same team switch to the next when one loses.

Name: DUEL_RETURN_TO_DECK_TRIGGERS
Summary: Trigger Effects can activate when the card is sent to the Deck.
Description: In Duels with this option, Trigger Effects that are triggered when the card leaves the field can activate when the card is sent to the Deck or Extra Deck.

Name: DUEL_SEPARATE_PZONE
Summary: Includes Pendulum Zones separate from Spell & Trap Zones.
Description: Duels with this option have distinct [Pendulum Zones](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Pendulum_Zone), separate from the Spell & Trap Zones. For Pendulum Zones integrated in the Spell & Trap Zones, see [`DUEL_PZONE`](/api/constants/DuelOption/DUEL_PZONE).

Name: DUEL_SIMPLE_AI
Description: Duels with this option include a simple AI player that will activate effects and make decisions when prompted.

Name: DUEL_SINGLE_CHAIN_IN_DAMAGE_SUBSTEP
Summary: Only one Chain can occur during each substep of the Damage Step.
Description: In Duels with this option, only one Chain can occur during each substep of the Damage Step (unless the resolution of one Chain triggers some other effect).

Name: DUEL_SPSUMMON_ONCE_OLD_NEGATE
Summary: Negated Special Summons do not count for Special Summon limits.
Description: In Duels with this option, negated Special Summons do not count for Special Summon limits. For example, if the Special Summon of ["Sky Striker Ace - Kagari"](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Sky_Striker_Ace_-_Kagari) is negated, the player would still be able to Special Summon another copy of "Sky Striker Ace - Kagari".

Name: DUEL_STORE_ATTACK_REPLAYS
Summary: Battle replays rewind back to the beginning of the Battle Step.
Description: In Duels with this option, [battle replays](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Replay) rewind back to the beginning of the Battle Step where the attack may be redeclared, and will be treated as an entirely new attack. This means that if the attacking player decides not to attack at all with the monster involved in the replay, it may attack again later in the Battle Phase.

Name: DUEL_TCG_FAST_EFFECT_IGNITION
Summary: Ignition Effects in Chain Link 1 are treated as fast effects.
Description: In Duels with this option, an Ignition Effect is treated as a fast effect if it is the first effect in the Chain.

Name: DUEL_TCG_SEGOC_FIRSTTRIGGER
Summary: Simultaneous trigger effects on a chain follow TCG ordering.
Description: In Duels with this option, simultaneous trigger effects on a chain follow [TCG ordering](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Simultaneous_Effects#TCG).

Name: DUEL_TCG_SEGOC_NONPUBLIC
Summary: Private Trigger Effects have the same timing as other Trigger Effects.
Description: In Duels with this option, Trigger Effects of cards in private locations can be activated in the same timing as other Trigger Effects, following [TCG SEGOC rules](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Simultaneous_Effects#TCG).

Name: DUEL_TEST_MODE
Summary: The user can control both players.
Description: In Duels with this option, the user can control both players.

Name: DUEL_TRAP_MONSTERS_NOT_USE_ZONE
Summary: Trap Monsters do not occupy a Spell & Trap Zone.
Description: In Duels with this option, [Trap Monsters](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Trap_Monster) do not occupy a Spell & Trap Zone while they are summoned as monsters even if they are still treated as Trap cards.

Name: DUEL_TRIGGER_ONLY_IN_LOCATION
Summary: Trigger Effects cannot activate if the card is moved.
Description: In Duels with this option, Trigger Effects cannot activate if the card was moved from where it fulfilled its activation requirement before its effect activates.

Name: DUEL_TRIGGER_WHEN_PRIVATE_KNOWLEDGE
Summary: Trigger Effects can activate when sent to a location that is private knowledge.
Description: In Duels with this option, Trigger Effects can activate even if the card is sent to a location that is not public knowledge.

Name: DUEL_UNLIMITED_SUMMONS
Summary: Players can perform any number of Normal Summons/Sets.
Description: In Duels with this option, players can perform any number of Normal Summons/Sets per turn.

Name: DUEL_USE_TRAPS_IN_NEW_CHAIN
Summary: Continuous Traps cannot activate effects in the same chain they're activated.
Description: In Duels with this option, a Continuous Trap cannot activate its optional fast effects in the same chain the card itself is activated.

Name: CATEGORY_ANNOUNCE
Description: An activated effect with this category requires declaring a card name.

Name: CATEGORY_ATKCHANGE
Description: An activated effect with this category may modify a monster's ATK on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_COIN
Description: An activated effect with this category may flip a coin(s) on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_CONTROL
Description: An activated effect with this category may switch the control of a monster(s) on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_COUNTER
Summary: Place a counter(s) on a card(s).
Description: An activated effect with this category may place a counter(s) on a card(s) on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_DAMAGE
Description: An activated effect with this category may inflict effect damage on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_DECKDES
Summary: Sends a card(s) from the Deck to the GY or banishes them.
Description: An activated effect with this category may send a card(s) from the Deck to the GY, or banish them, on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_DEFCHANGE
Description: An activated effect with this category may modify a monster's DEF on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_DESTROY
Description: An activated effect with this category may destroy a card(s) on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_DICE
Description: An activated effect with this category may roll a six-sided die on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_DISABLE
Description: An activated effect with this category may negate a card **effect** on resolution. For effects that may negate the **activation** of a card or effect, use [`CATEGORY_NEGATE`](/api/constants/EffectCategory/CATEGORY_NEGATE).

Name: CATEGORY_DISABLE_SUMMON
Summary: Negates the Summon of a monster(s).
Description: An activated effect with this category may negate the Summon of a monster(s) on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_DRAW
Description: An activated effect with this category may draw a card(s) on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_EQUIP
Summary: Equips a card(s) to another card.
Description: An activated effect with this category may equip a card(s) to another card on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_FLIP
Description: An activated effect with this category is a [FLIP effect](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Flip_effect).

Name: CATEGORY_FUSION_SUMMON
Description: An activated effect with this category may perform a Fusion Summon(s) on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_HANDES
Summary: Sends a card(s) from the hand to the GY or banishes them.
Description: An activated effect with this category may send a card(s) from the hand to the GY, or banish them, on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_LEAVE_GRAVE
Summary: Moves a card(s) from the GY to another location.
Description: An activated effect with this category may move a card(s) from the GY to another location on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_LVCHANGE
Description: An activated effect with this category may modify a monster's Level on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_NEGATE
Summary: Negates the activation of a card or effect.
Description: An activated effect with this category may negate the **activation** of a card or effect on resolution. For effects that may negate a card **effect**, use [`CATEGORY_DISABLE`](/api/constants/EffectCategory/CATEGORY_DISABLE).

Name: CATEGORY_POSITION
Description: An activated effect with this category may change a monster's battle position on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_RECOVER
Description: An activated effect with this category may make a player(s) gain LP on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_RELEASE
Description: An activated effect with this category may Tribute a card(s) on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_REMOVE
Description: An activated effect with this category may banish a card(s) on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_SEARCH
Summary: Adds a card(s) from the Deck to the hand.
Description: An activated effect with this category may add a card(s) from the Deck to the hand on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_SPECIAL_SUMMON
Description: An activated effect with this category may Special Summon a monster(s) on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_SUMMON
Description: An activated effect with this category may Normal Summon a monster(s) after its Chain Link resolves.

Name: CATEGORY_TODECK
Summary: Sends a card(s) to the Deck.
Description: An activated effect with this category may send a card(s) to the Deck on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_TOEXTRA
Summary: Sends a card(s) to the Extra Deck.
Description: An activated effect with this category may send a card(s) to the Extra Deck on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_TOGRAVE
Summary: Sends a card(s) to the GY.
Description: An activated effect with this category may send a card(s) to the GY on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_TOHAND
Summary: Sends a card(s) to the hand.
Description: An activated effect with this category may send a card(s) to the hand on resolution.

Name: CATEGORY_TOKEN
Description: An activated effect with this category may Special Summon a Token(s) on resolution.

Name: EFFECT_ACTIVATE_COST
Summary: Affected players must pay a cost to activate effects.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) must perform an additional cost, defined as the effect's [operation function](/api/functions/Effect/SetOperation), to activate effects.

Name: EFFECT_ADD_ATTRIBUTE
Summary: Affected cards are treated as an additional attribute(s).
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is **also** treated as the [attribute(s)](/api/enums/MonsterAttribute) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). This does not overwrite the card's current attributes, unlike [`EFFECT_CHANGE_ATTRIBUTE`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_ATTRIBUTE).

Name: EFFECT_ADD_CODE
Summary: Affected cards are treated as an additional name (passcode).
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is **also** treated as the name (passcode) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). This does not overwrite the card's current passcode, unlike [`EFFECT_CHANGE_CODE`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_CODE).

Name: EFFECT_ADD_EXTRA_TRIBUTE
Summary: Affected cards can be Tributed in addition to the default cards.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) can be Tributed in addition to the cards that can be Tributed by default.

Name: EFFECT_ADD_LINKMARKER
Summary: Affected cards gain additional Link Arrows.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) gains the [Link Arrow(s)](/api/enums/LinkMarker) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). This does not overwrite the card's current Link Arrows, unlike [`EFFECT_CHANGE_LINKMARKER`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_LINKMARKER).

Name: EFFECT_ADD_LINK_CODE
Summary: Affected cards were treated as an additional name for Link Summons.
Description: A card that was affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) was **also** treated as the name (passcode) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue) when being used as material for a [Link Summon](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Link_Summon).

Status.message: Code is no longer used.

Name: EFFECT_ADD_LINK_SETCODE
Summary: Affected cards were treated as an additional archetype for Link Summons.
Description: A card that was affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) was **also** treated as the [archetype](/api/enums/Archetype) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue) when being used as material for a [Link Summon](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Link_Summon).

Status.message: Code is no longer used.

Name: EFFECT_ADD_RACE
Summary: Affected cards are treated as an additional race(s).
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is **also** treated as the [race(s)](/api/enums/MonsterRace) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). This does not overwrite the card's current races, unlike [`EFFECT_CHANGE_RACE`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_RACE).

Name: EFFECT_ADD_SETCODE
Summary: Affected cards are treated as an additional archetype.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is **also** treated as the [archetype](/api/enums/Archetype) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). This does not overwrite the card's current archetypes, unlike [`EFFECT_CHANGE_SETCODE`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_SETCODE).

Name: EFFECT_ADD_TYPE
Summary: Affected cards are treated as an additional card type(s).
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is **also** treated as the [card type(s)](/api/enums/CardType) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). This does not overwrite the card's current types, unlike [`EFFECT_CHANGE_TYPE`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_TYPE).

Name: EFFECT_ALLOW_NEGATIVE
Summary: Affected cards can have a non-positive Level.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) can have a non-positive Level (negative or `0`).

Name: EFFECT_ALSO_BATTLE_DAMAGE
Summary: Battle damage inflicted to controller is also inflicted to the opponent.
Description: Any battle damage inflicted to the controller of a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) (in battles involving that monster) is also inflicted to their opponent.

Name: EFFECT_ATTACK_ALL
Summary: Affected cards can attack all valid attack targets once each.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) can attack all monsters that fulfill the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue), once each.

Name: EFFECT_ATTACK_COST
Summary: Affected players must pay a cost to declare attacks.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) must perform a cost, defined as the effect's [operation function](/api/functions/Effect/SetOperation), to declare an attack.

Name: EFFECT_ATTACK_DISABLED
Summary: Affected cards have had their attack negated.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) has had its attack negated in the current Battle Phase. Effects with this code are typically not manually registered in card scripts, but are automatically registered when a card's attack is negated.

Name: EFFECT_AVOID_BATTLE_DAMAGE
Summary: Controller of affected monsters do not take damage in battles involving them.
Description: The controller of a monster affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) does not take battle damage in battles involving the card.

Name: EFFECT_BATTLE_DAMAGE_TO_EFFECT
Summary: Battle damage from affected cards is treated as effect damage.
Description: Any battle damage inflicted by a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is treated as effect damage instead.

Name: EFFECT_BATTLE_DESTROY_REDIRECT
Summary: Monsters destroyed by battle by affected cards are sent to a given location.
Description: Monsters destroyed by battle by a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is sent to the [location](/api/enums/Location) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue).

Name: EFFECT_BECOME_LINKED_ZONE
Summary: Specified zones are treated as linked.
Description: Zones specified as the [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue) of an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) are treated as [linked zones](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Points_to), as though a Link Monster is pointing to it.

Name: EFFECT_BECOME_QUICK
Summary: Affected Normal Spell can be activated like a Quick-Play Spell.
Description: A [Normal Spell](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Normal_Spell_Card) affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) can be activated like a [Quick-Play Spell](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Quick-Play_Spell_Card).

Name: EFFECT_BOTH_BATTLE_DAMAGE
Summary: Battle damage involving affected cards is inflicted to both players.
Description: Any battle damage inflicted in battles involving a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is inflicted to both players.

Name: EFFECT_BP_FIRST_TURN
Summary: Affected players can enter the Battle Phase in the first turn.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) can enter the [Battle Phase](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Battle_Phase) in the first turn of the Duel.

Name: EFFECT_BP_TWICE
Summary: Affected players perform their Battle Phase twice.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) can perform their [Battle Phase](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Battle_Phase) twice.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_ACTIVATE
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot activate effects that fulfill the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_ATTACK
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot attack. This also stops attacks that have already been declared before the effect is applied, unlike [`EFFECT_CANNOT_ATTACK_ANNOUNCE`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CANNOT_ATTACK_ANNOUNCE).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_ATTACK_ANNOUNCE
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot declare attacks. This does not stop an attack that has already been declared before the effect is applied, unlike[`EFFECT_CANNOT_ATTACK`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CANNOT_ATTACK).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_BE_BATTLE_TARGET
Summary: Affected monsters cannot be targeted for attacks.
Description: A monster affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be targeted for attacks by cards that fulfill the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). Also, a player cannot attack at all, even directly, if all monsters their opponent controls are affected by effects with this code. To allow direct attacks, use [`EFFECT_IGNORE_BATTLE_TARGET`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_IGNORE_BATTLE_TARGET) instead.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_BE_EFFECT_TARGET
Summary: Affected card cannot be targeted by card effects.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be targeted by card effects that fulfill the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_BE_FUSION_MATERIAL
Summary: Affected card cannot be used as Fusion Material.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be used as [Fusion Material](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Fusion_Material) for the Fusion Summon of a card that fulfills the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_BE_LINK_MATERIAL
Summary: Affected card cannot be used as Link Material.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be used as [Link Material](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Link_Material) for the Link Summon of a card that fulfills the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_BE_MATERIAL
Summary: Affected card cannot be used as material for a Summon.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be used as material for the Summon of a card that fulfills the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_BE_SYNCHRO_MATERIAL
Summary: Affected card cannot be used as Synchro Material.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be used as [Synchro Material](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Synchro_Material) for the Synchro Summon of a card that fulfills the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_BE_XYZ_MATERIAL
Summary: Affected card cannot be used as Xyz Material.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be used as [Xyz Material](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Xyz_Material) for the Xyz Summon of a card that fulfills the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_BP
Summary: Affected players cannot enter the Battle Phase.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot enter the [Battle Phase](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Battle_Phase).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_CHANGE_CONTROL
Summary: Control of affected cards cannot be changed.
Description: The control of a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be changed.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_CHANGE_POSITION
Summary: Battle position of affected cards cannot be changed manually.
Description: The battle position of a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be changed by a player manually.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_CHANGE_POS_E
Summary: Battle position of affected cards cannot be changed by card effects.
Description: The battle position of a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be changed by card effects.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_DIRECT_ATTACK
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot attack directly.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_DISABLE
Summary: The effects of affected cards cannot be negated.
Description: The effects of a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be negated.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_DISABLE_FLIP_SUMMON
Summary: The Flip Summon of affected cards cannot be negated.
Description: The [Flip Summon](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Flip_Summon) of a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be negated.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_DISABLE_SPSUMMON
Summary: The Special Summon of affected cards cannot be negated.
Description: The [Special Summon](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Special_Summon) of a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be negated.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_DISABLE_SUMMON
Summary: The Normal Summon of affected cards cannot be negated.
Description: The [Normal Summon](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Normal_Summon) of a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be negated.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_DISCARD_DECK
Summary: Affected players cannot send cards from their Deck to the GY.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot send cards from their Deck to the GY.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_DISCARD_HAND
Summary: Affected players cannot send cards from their hand to the GY.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot send cards from their hand to the GY.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_DISEFFECT
Summary: The resolution of effects of affected cards cannot be negated.
Description: The effects (resolution) activated by a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be negated. However, their **activation** can still be negated. To prevent activation negation, use [`EFFECT_CANNOT_INACTIVATE`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CANNOT_INACTIVATE).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_DRAW
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot draw cards.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_EP
Summary: Affected players cannot enter the End Phase.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot enter the [End Phase](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/End_Phase).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_FLIP_SUMMON
Summary: Affected cards cannot be Flip Summoned.
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is affecting a card(s), that card cannot be [Flip Summoned](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Flip_Summon). If it's affecting a player(s), that player cannot Flip Summon monsters that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) (or any monster if no target function is provided).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_INACTIVATE
Summary: The activation of effects of affected cards cannot be negated.
Description: The activation of effects of a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot be negated. However, their effect (resolution) can still be negated. To prevent effect negation, use [`EFFECT_CANNOT_DISEFFECT`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CANNOT_DISEFFECT).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_LOSE_DECK
Summary: Affected players cannot lose by deckout.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot lose the Duel by ["deck out"](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Deck_out).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_LOSE_EFFECT
Summary: Affected players cannot lose through alternate victory conditions.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot lose the Duel through [alternate victory conditions](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Victory_condition#Alternate_victory_condition).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_LOSE_LP
Summary: Affected players cannot lose by having 0 LP.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot lose the Duel by having 0 LP.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_M2
Summary: Affected players cannot enter the Main Phase 2.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot enter the [Main Phase 2](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Main_Phase_2).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_MSET
Summary: Affected players cannot Normal Set monsters.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot [Normal Set](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Normal_Set) monsters that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_PLACE_COUNTER
Summary: Affected players cannot place counters on cards.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot place counters on cards that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_RELEASE
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is affecting a card(s), that card cannot be Tributed. If it's affecting a player(s), that player cannot Tribute cards that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) (or any card if no target function is provided).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_REMOVE
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is affecting a card(s), that card cannot be banished. If it's affecting a player(s), that player cannot banish cards that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) (or any card if no target function is provided).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_SELECT_BATTLE_TARGET
Summary: Affected monster cannot target monsters for attacks.
Description: A monster affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot target cards that fulfill the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue) for attacks.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_SELECT_EFFECT_TARGET
Summary: Affected cards cannot activate their effects that target.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot activate its effects that target.

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_SPECIAL_SUMMON
Summary: Affected cards cannot be Special Summoned.
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is affecting a card(s), that card cannot be [Special Summoned](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Special_Summon). If it's affecting a player(s), that player cannot Special Summon monsters that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) (or any monster if no target function is provided).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_SSET
Summary: Affected players cannot Set Spells and Traps.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) cannot [Set](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Set) Spells and Traps that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_SUMMON
Summary: Affected cards cannot be Normal Summoned.
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is affecting a card(s), that card cannot be [Normal Summoned](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Normal_Summon). If it's affecting a player(s), that player cannot Normal Summon monsters that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) (or any monster if no target function is provided).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_TO_DECK
Summary: Affected cards cannot be sent to the Deck.
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is affecting a card(s), that card cannot be sent to the Deck. If it's affecting a player(s), that player cannot send cards that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) to the Deck (or any card if no target function is provided).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_TO_GRAVE
Summary: Affected cards cannot be sent to the GY as cost.
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is affecting a card(s), that card cannot be sent to the GY. If it's affecting a player(s), that player cannot send cards that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) to the GY (or any card if no target function is provided).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_TO_GRAVE_AS_COST
Summary: Affected cards cannot be sent to the GY as cost.
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is affecting a card(s), that card cannot be sent to the GY as cost. If it's affecting a player(s), that player cannot send cards that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) to the GY as cost (or any card if no target function is provided).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_TO_HAND
Summary: Affected cards cannot be sent to the hand as cost.
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is affecting a card(s), that card cannot be sent to the hand. If it's affecting a player(s), that player cannot send cards that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) to the hand (or any card if no target function is provided).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_TRIGGER
Summary: Affected cards cannot activate its effects.
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is affecting a card(s), that card cannot activate its effects. If it's affecting a player(s), that player cannot activate the effects of cards that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) (or any card if no target function is provided).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_TURN_SET
Summary: Affected cards cannot be flipped face-down.
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is affecting a card(s), that card cannot be flipped face-down. If it's affecting a player(s), that player cannot flip cards that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) face-down (or any card if no target function is provided).

Name: EFFECT_CANNOT_USE_AS_COST
Summary: Affected cards cannot be used as cost.
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is affecting a card(s), that card cannot be used as cost. If it's affecting a player(s), that player cannot use cards that fulfill the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) as cost (or any card if no target function is provided).

Name: EFFECT_CHAIN_MATERIAL
Summary: Affected players will use specified materials for a Fusion Summon.
Description: A player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) will use cards from the [group](/api/types/Group) returned by the effect's [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget) as materials for the [Fusion Summon](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Fusion_Summon) of a monster that fulfills the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). The returned group completely replaces the default group of usable materials. To add to the default group, use [`EFFECT_EXTRA_FUSION_MATERIAL`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_EXTRA_FUSION_MATERIAL) instead.

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_ATTRIBUTE
Summary: Affected cards are treated as the specified attribute(s).
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is treated as the [attribute(s)](/api/enums/MonsterAttribute) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). This overwrites the card's current attributes, unlike [`EFFECT_ADD_ATTRIBUTE`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_ADD_ATTRIBUTE).

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_BATTLE_DAMAGE
Summary: Affected cards have modified battle damage.
Description: Any battle damage inflicted by a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is changed by the [damage modifier](/api/enums/DamageModifier) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue).

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_BATTLE_STAT
Summary: Battles involving affected cards use different stats for damage calculation.
Description: During battles involving a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode), the number returned by the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue) is used for each battling monster for [damage calculation](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Damage_calculation) instead of their respective ATK/DEF.

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_CODE
Summary: Affected cards are treated as the specified name (passcode).
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is treated as the name (passcode) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). This overwrites the card's current passcode, unlike [`EFFECT_ADD_CODE`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_ADD_CODE).

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_DAMAGE
Summary: Damage inflicted to affected players is changed.
Description: Any damage inflicted to a player affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is changed into the number returned by the effect's [value function](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue).

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_ENVIRONMENT
Summary: Treats a given passcode as an active Field Spell.
Description: If an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is applying and there are no cards in either Field Zone, the passcode specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue) is treated as an active Field Spell.

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_LEVEL
Summary: The raw Level of affected monsters becomes a specified value.
Description: The **raw** Level of a monster affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) becomes the number specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). "Raw" here means the set value is where calculations for the actual Level starts, i.e., the monster's actual Level is further calculated by applying previously-registered [effects that update the monster's Level](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_UPDATE_LEVEL). To set a value as the actual Level, ignoring all other previous effects that change the monster's Level, use [`EFFECT_CHANGE_LEVEL_FINAL`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_LEVEL_FINAL) instead.

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_LEVEL_FINAL
Summary: The Level of affected monsters becomes a specified value.
Description: The Level of a monster affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) becomes the number specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). The set value will be the monster's actual Level, i.e., it ignores all other previous effects that change the monster's Level. To allow applying previously-registered [effects that update the monster's Level](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_UPDATE_LEVEL), use [`EFFECT_CHANGE_LEVEL`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_LEVEL) instead.

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_LINK
Summary: The raw Link Rating of affected monsters becomes a specified value.
Description: The **raw** Link Rating of a monster affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) becomes the number specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). "Raw" here means the set value is where calculations for the actual Link Rating starts, i.e., the monster's actual Link Rating is further calculated by applying previously-registered [effects that update the monster's Link Rating](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_UPDATE_LINK). To set a value as the actual Link Rating, ignoring all other previous effects that change the monster's Link Rating, use [`EFFECT_CHANGE_LINK_FINAL`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_LINK_FINAL) instead.

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_LINKMARKER
Summary: The Link Arrows of affected cards become the specified value.
Description: The Link Arrows of a card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) become the [Link Arrow(s)](/api/enums/LinkMarker) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). This overwrites the card's current Link Arrows, unlike [`EFFECT_ADD_LINKMARKER`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_ADD_LINKMARKER).

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_LINK_FINAL
Summary: The Link Rating of affected monsters becomes a specified value.
Description: The Link Rating of a monster affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) becomes the number specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). The set value will be the monster's actual Link Rating, i.e., it ignores all other previous effects that change the monster's Link Rating. To allow applying previously-registered [effects that update the monster's Link Rating](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_UPDATE_LINK), use [`EFFECT_CHANGE_LINK`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_LINK) instead.

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_LSCALE
Summary: The Left Pendulum Scale of affected cards becomes a specified value.
Description: The Left Pendulum Scale of a Pendulum Card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) becomes the number specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). The set value will be the card's actual Left Pendulum Scale, i.e., it ignores all other previous effects that change the card's Left Pendulum Scale.

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_RACE
Summary: Affected cards are treated as the specified race(s).
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is treated as the [race(s)](/api/enums/MonsterRace) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). This overwrites the card's current races, unlike [`EFFECT_ADD_RACE`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_ADD_RACE).

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_RANK
Summary: The raw Rank of affected monsters becomes a specified value.
Description: The **raw** Rank of a monster affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) becomes the number specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). "Raw" here means the set value is where calculations for the actual Rank starts, i.e., the monster's actual Rank is further calculated by applying previously-registered [effects that update the monster's Rank](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_UPDATE_RANK). To set a value as the actual Rank, ignoring all other previous effects that change the monster's Rank, use [`EFFECT_CHANGE_RANK_FINAL`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_RANK_FINAL) instead.

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_RANK_FINAL
Summary: The Rank of affected monsters becomes a specified value.
Description: The Rank of a monster affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) becomes the number specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). The set value will be the monster's actual Rank, i.e., it ignores all other previous effects that change the monster's Rank. To allow applying previously-registered [effects that update the monster's Rank](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_UPDATE_RANK), use [`EFFECT_CHANGE_RANK`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_RANK) instead.

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_RSCALE
Summary: The Right Pendulum Scale of affected cards becomes a specified value.
Description: The Right Pendulum Scale of a Pendulum Card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) becomes the number specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). The set value will be the card's actual Right Pendulum Scale, i.e., it ignores all other previous effects that change the card's Right Pendulum Scale.

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_SETCODE
Summary: Affected cards are treated as the specified archetype.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is treated as the [archetype](/api/enums/Archetype) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). This overwrites the card's current archetypes, unlike [`EFFECT_ADD_SETCODE`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_ADD_SETCODE).

Name: EFFECT_CHANGE_TYPE
Summary: Affected cards are treated as the specified card type(s).
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is **also** treated as the [card type(s)](/api/enums/CardType) specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue). This overwrites the card's current types, unlike [`EFFECT_ADD_TYPE`](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_ADD_TYPE).

Name: EFFECT_COUNTER_LIMIT
Summary: Affected cards can only hold a limited number of a certain counter.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) can only hold a limited number of a certain counter. The limit is specified as the effect's [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue), and the type of counter is specified by adding it to this code (e.g. `EFFECT_COUNTER_LIMIT+COUNTER_SPELL`). Effects with this code are typically registered using [`Card.SetCounterLimit`](/api/functions/Card/SetCounterLimit) rather than created manually.

Name: EFFECT_COUNTER_PERMIT
Summary: Affected cards are allowed to hold a certain counter that needs permission.
Description: A card affected by an [effect](/api/types/Effect) with this [code](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode) is allowed  to hold a certain counter that otherwise cannot be placed on cards, i.e., counters that "need permission" to be placed. The type of counter is specified by adding it to this code (e.g. `EFFECT_COUNTER_PERMIT+COUNTER_SPELL`). Effects with this code are typically registered using [`Card.EnableCounterPermit`](/api/functions/Card/EnableCounterPermit) rather than created manually.

Name: EFFECT_CYBERDARK_WORLD
Summary: Affected players can equip monsters from opponent's GY for "Cyberdark" effects.
